name: solo-docs-page
title: Docs and sources
description: Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-page-implementation.generated.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.workspace-shell",
  "workspace": "solo",
  "implementationStatus": "mounted-react-workspace-page",
  "source": "registry/workspaces/solo/workspace-shell.json",
  "primitiveFactory": {
    "version": "2026-06-09.framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs",
    "implementationStatus": "framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "page.solo.docs",
    "title": "Docs and sources",
    "description": "Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.",
    "components": [
      "docs-source-panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "panel"
    ]
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "/solo/docs",
      "page": "page.solo.docs",
      "title": "Docs and sources",
      "blocks": [
        "block.solo.docs-sources",
        "block.solo.forms"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "id": "block.solo.docs-sources",
      "title": "Docs sources",
      "component": "docs-source-panel",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-docs-sources-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "long-content"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.solo.forms",
      "title": "Quick form",
      "component": "text-field",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-forms-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "invalid"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "components": [
    "data-list",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "panel",
    "text-field"
  ],
  "agentManifests": [
    {
      "component": "data-list",
      "manifestId": "agm_data_list",
      "manifestSchema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/agent-manifest.schema.json",
      "schemaVersion": "2026-06-23.agent-manifest",
      "propContractVersion": "2026-06-09.ui-props",
      "actionSlots": [],
      "bindingMode": "resident-component",
      "execution": "display-only-data-never-code"
    },
    {
      "component": "docs-source-panel",
      "manifestId": "agm_docs_source_panel",
      "manifestSchema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/agent-manifest.schema.json",
      "schemaVersion": "2026-06-23.agent-manifest",
      "propContractVersion": "2026-06-09.ui-props",
      "actionSlots": [],
      "bindingMode": "resident-component",
      "execution": "display-only-data-never-code"
    },
    {
      "component": "panel",
      "manifestId": "agm_panel",
      "manifestSchema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/agent-manifest.schema.json",
      "schemaVersion": "2026-06-23.agent-manifest",
      "propContractVersion": "2026-06-09.ui-props",
      "actionSlots": [],
      "bindingMode": "resident-component",
      "execution": "display-only-data-never-code"
    },
    {
      "component": "text-field",
      "manifestId": "agm_text_field",
      "manifestSchema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/agent-manifest.schema.json",
      "schemaVersion": "2026-06-23.agent-manifest",
      "propContractVersion": "2026-06-09.ui-props",
      "actionSlots": [],
      "bindingMode": "resident-component",
      "execution": "display-only-data-never-code"
    }
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "renderedBlockCount": 2,
    "responsiveLayout": "single-column-safe mounted React composition",
    "a11yStructure": "page routes compose labelled resident React block implementations",
    "displayOnly": true
  },
  "runtime": {
    "runtimeReactRenderer": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": true
  },
  "reactMount": {
    "schemaVersion": "2026-06-12.mounted-react-workspace-routes",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs",
    "packageName": "@jami-studio/ui",
    "rendererBoundary": "React workspace components are install-time/app code, not harness-originated renderer payload execution.",
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "serverRenderedStaticRoutes": true,
